title: Cliff-Top Ocean View Estate in Kamala
blurb: A five-level cliff-top estate on Phuket's exclusive west-coast headland — sweeping Andaman sunset views, an infinity pool, a private cinema and games room, and a seaside massage sala, staffed with a villa manager, chef and housekeeping team.
detail:
Perched on a secluded headland on Phuket's celebrated west coast, this five-level villa is built into the cliff to frame uninterrupted views of the Andaman Sea and its sunsets. Designed with a restrained, contemporary hand and finished to an exacting standard, the villa blends seamlessly into its dramatic natural setting while remaining minutes from Kamala's beach and village.

Six sea-view bedrooms are spread across the five levels — two master suites with wraparound decks and soaker tubs, a third king room, a fourth with twin queens and a balcony, and two further king rooms sharing a Jack-and-Jill bathroom — comfortably sleeping up to 14 guests. Living spaces flow from a formal dining room and full-service kitchen with breakfast bar to a home cinema with a large lounge and a separate games room with a pool table and bar.

Outside, an infinity pool stretches along the clifftop deck, bordered by loungers and daybeds with the sea falling away beyond. A dedicated seaside sala with two massage beds, a poolside barbecue and bar, and covered parking for two cars round out the grounds, all within a secure, landscaped estate.

A villa manager, private chef and housekeeping team are on hand throughout the stay, with round-the-clock estate security, complimentary Wi-Fi, and airport transfers arranged on request — a private clifftop retreat for families and groups seeking privacy without sacrificing convenience.

features.l: Home cinema & games room with pool table
